header.title: Super Admins
header.description: Manage users with super admin access across the platform.

dialog.title: Add super admin
dialog.description: Enter the email address of an existing user to grant super admin access.
dialog.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

empty.title: No super admins
empty.description: Super admins you add will show up here.

addSuperAdmin.error: Failed to add super admin. Make sure the email belongs to an existing user.
addSuperAdmin.errorNotFound: No user found with this email address.

confirmRemove.title: Remove super admin
confirmRemove.description: Are you sure you want to remove super admin access from {{name}}?

removeSuperAdmin.error: Failed to remove super admin status.
removeSuperAdmin.errorSelfDemotion: You cannot remove your own super admin status.
removeSuperAdmin.errorLastAdmin: Cannot remove the last super admin.
removeSuperAdmin.errorNotSuperAdmin: This user is not a super admin.
